answer: Okay, let's see. Xiaoming added up all the page numbers from 1 to some number N, and the sum was 4979. But then he realized that one sheet was missing, which means two consecutive pages are missing. So the actual sum he should have gotten is 4979 plus the sum of those two missing pages. Wait, no. Wait, he added the pages as they were, but one sheet (two pages) was missing. So the sum he got, 497
